headline: Chubb’s Hormuz Reinsurance Role And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Chubb (NYSE:CB) has joined a US led maritime reinsurance initiative focused on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz. The program seeks to expand reinsurance coverage for energy related shipping during a period of elevated risk and market volatility. This move places Chubb at the center of efforts to support stability across a key global energy corridor. Chubb enters this development with its shares trading at $327.4 and a 1 year return of 20.6%, alongside a 72.3% return over 3 years...
